geography: TX — DFW (Dallas, Tarrant, Collin, Denton, Rockwall, Kaufman, Ellis, Johnson) + Austin (Travis, Williamson, Hays, Comal) + SA (Bexar, Comal, Guadalupe) + Houston (Harris, Fort Bend, Brazoria, Montgomery)
vertical_notes: TX-specific trade — expansive clay soils across DFW/Austin/SA create the steady demand. NO state-level licensing for foundation repair in TX (unlike plumbing/electrical/HVAC) → spine must come from trade associations + BBB + Comptroller NAICS 238190 sales-tax-permit holders + Google Maps independents. AGGRESSIVE chain/franchise exclusion required (Olshan, Ram Jack, HD Foundations, Granite, TerraFirma, Atlas, Acculevel, Power Lift, Foundation Repair Texas, Brent's, Lone Star, etc.). Multiple TX cities = likely chain. Successor candidates: family member in ops, long-tenured field foreman promoted to operations manager / VP, spouse listed as co-owner. Recurring revenue tells: annual foundation inspection, lifetime transferable warranty, monitoring program, drainage maintenance, HOA contracts, engineering-report annuity.
